events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: adding water on site to boost slump is flagged as a **fail** (high risk, non-compliant/installed-defective) because it pushes the water-cementitious ratio past the approved mix design without engineer authorization — a violation of ACI 301's retempering limits and a threat to strength/durability per ACI 304. Immediate controls: stop the water addition, verify w/cm and test slump/air content, reject or quarantine non-conforming loads, and get mix-designer/EOR sign-off before resuming placement.
